apikit-soap:router.apikit-soap:attributes: #[ %dw 2.0 output application/java --- { headers: attributes.headers, method: attributes.method, queryString: attributes.queryString }]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/java ns ns0 http://mtis.ua.es/elearning/legacy --- { ns0#synchronizeContentsResponse: { ns0#syncId: "sync-" ++ uuid(), ns0#status: "SUCCESS", ns0#processedItems: 2, ns0#updatedItems: 2, ns0#failedItems: 0, ns0#startedAt: "2026-05-15T10:00:00", ns0#finishedAt: "2026-05-15T10:00:03", ns0#message: "Sincronizacion simulada con repositorio legacy completada" } }
